历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 2208 → 1880 → 7272 → 3424 → 3537. In 2023, there was an abnormal significant drop (7272nd place), which recovered to 3424th place in 2024, and remained basically stable at 3537th place in 2025. The baseline ranking in the past two years is approximately in the 3400–3500 range. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 43, 48, 37, 39, and 42 respectively. In 2026, the plan is 41 students, a slight reduction of about 2.4% compared to 2025, which is a very small reduction and has limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 19th (Top 20), with stable rankings around 19th in recent years, indicating an extremely high school level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents, with no major negative public opinion. On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 37th (relatively hot), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level. Regarding historical admission anomalies, there was a record of a significant ranking drop in Jiangxi Province in 2022, but the admission trend in Heilongjiang Province has stabilized in the past two years. It has 6 A+ disciplines: Education, Psychology, Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Geography, and Marxist Theory, as well as 6 A disciplines: Mathematics, Statistics, Ecology, Environmental Science and Engineering, Foreign Languages and Literature, and Physical Education. There are a total of 18 disciplines rated A- or above, with top-tier disciplinary strength that strongly attracts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication have consistently high social popularity (highly recommended/recommended), which aligns well with BNU's Physics Category enrollment majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Statistics, etc.). The popularity of Teacher Training/Education majors is mixed and under observation. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Heilongjiang Province is approximately 114,000 (estimated based on historical proportions), a slight decrease from 117,000 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the historical rankings have stabilized in the 3400–3500 range in the past two years, the 2026 plan has a slight reduction (-2.4%), the school level is top-tier with neutral reputation, and the number of Physics Category candidates in Heilongjiang Province has slightly decreased, based on the 2025 baseline of 3537th place, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 3486th place, with a range of 3137–3835.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 3486th, with a range of 3137–3835. Candidates near the lower bound (3137th) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Mathematics, Liyun Experimental Class, Statistics, Psychology); those near the predicted value are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Physics, Economics), while also attempting Tier 1; those near the upper bound (3835th) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 majors as safety options (Public Administration, Education). Among BNU's Physics Category enrollment majors, disciplines like Mathematics, Statistics, and Psychology (A/A+) are the most competitive, while majors in Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are relatively easier to enter but have lower social popularity.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 181 → 222 → 168 → 144 → 285. From 2021 to 2024, the overall fluctuation was within the range of 140–220, but in 2025, it significantly shifted backward to 285, moving back about 141 places compared to 2024, marking the largest decline in the past five years. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for History Category were 21, 21, 20, 19, and 20 respectively. In 2026, the planned enrollment is 14, a sharp reduction of 6 students (-30%) compared to 2025, which will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 19th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings in recent years, indicating a very high university level. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin heat total ranking is 37th (relatively hot). In 2022, Jiangxi Province experienced a significant drop in admission rankings, but the 2025 ranking shift in Heilongjiang's History Category is relatively large and requires attention. It has top-tier liberal arts A+ disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese History, Education, Psychology, and Marxist Theory, as well as A- disciplines like Law and Theoretical Economics, making its liberal arts strength nationally top-tier and highly attractive to liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the sharp 30% reduction in planned enrollment in 2026, the university's top-tier liberal arts strength and neutral reputation, and the slight decrease in History Category candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 285, the ranking number decreases. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 234, with a range of 184–284.
